title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review June 2025
content:
Key Takeaways:

California LCFS:
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price continued to fall by 17.91% month-over-month (MoM) in June.
  • Monthly credit transactions also decreased by 43.95% MoM in June.
British Columbia LCFS:
  • BC LCFS monthly trading volumes rose to 116.30 K credits in May from 14.35 K credits in April.
  • In May, BC LCFS credit prices rose by 1.16% month-over-month.
Oregon CFP:
  • In May, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 36.20% compared to April.
  • OR CFP trading activity witnessed a 1.90x times rise in May.
Canada CFR:
  • Canada CFR bid and offer prices for CC2 & CC3 rose MoM in June.
  • CC2 and CC3 bid prices stand at 197.31 CAD & offer prices stand at 214.62 CAD.
Washington CFS:
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS fell by 10.50% MoM.
  • For May, 98.505 K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $2.54 M.
Â United States RFS:
  • RIN generation decreased sharply by 52.38% in May.
  • A total of 4.06 B RINs were transacted in May, 23.91% less than April.
author: Mansift Kaur
